name: Herbal Soap (Tlc)
recipeIngredient: 1 large block olive or veg soap
3 drops essential oil - thyme, rosemary, horsechestnut
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the soap into a mixing bowl and add the remaining ingredients.
2. Heat gently in a double boiler until it melts and mix well.
3. Line an egg box with waxed paper and pour the soap into each section.
